reason: All acceptance criteria verified. parse_messenger_webhook extracts sender/message/text to UnifiedMessage(MESSENGER). parse_whatsapp_webhook extracts from/messages/body to UnifiedMessage(WHATSAPP). _verify_hub_signature uses HMAC-SHA256 + compare_digest. VERIFIERS dict has MESSENGER+WHATSAPP. Invalid sig returns 401 AUTH_INVALID_SIGNATURE. Empty entry/messaging/changes/messages return 400. All 19/19 tests pass. Coverage 91%.
